data.title: Bitcoin's Early Stage Valuation Discussed by Blockstream Co-Founder
data.description: According to PANews, Adam Back, a prominent figure in the Cypherpunk movement and co-founder of Blockstream, recently commented on the current state of Bitcoin. He stated, "We are still in the early stages, and Bitcoin remains inexpensive."

data.title: Trump Says Powell’s Firing “Can’t Come Soon Enough” in New Fed Clash
data.description:
President Trump reignited his feud with Fed Chair Jerome Powell, publicly calling for his removal over Powell’s refusal to cut interest rates.

The post Trump Says Powell’s Firing “Can’t Come Soon Enough” in New Fed Clash first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/04/18/trump-vs-powell-could-rock-the-economy/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=trump-vs-powell-could-rock-the-economy

data.title: KiloEX exploiter returned $6.9M after white hat bounty offer
data.description:
KiloEX received a return from the hacker that took between $7M and $7. 4M in a multi-chain exploit linked to flawed oracle prices.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kiloex-exploiter-returned-6-9m-bounty-offer/

data.title: The top five currencies in terms of trading volume on UPbit in the past 24 hours are AERGO, XRP, T, IQ and STRAX
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the latest data, the top five currencies in terms of transaction volume on the UPbit platform in the past 24 hours are: AERGO (US$595 million), XRP (US$215 million), T (US$188 million), IQ (US$131 million) and STRAX (US$129 million). In addition, UXLINK, STMX, ARDR, BIGTIME and GAS are also among the top ten.

data.title: Crypto Investors Take Note: Altcoins May Soon Outperform BTC
data.description:

Bitcoin’s dominance is expected to decline as other cryptocurrencies gain traction among users and projects with solid economic strategies. Emerging protocols like Toncoin, Sui, and Berachain are leading new adoption strategies, while memecoins. . .

data.title: Crypto Rug Pulls Decline 66% in 2025, But Financial Impact Grows
data.description:
TL;DR Fewer but Deadlier: Despite a 66% drop in the number of rug pulls in 2025, losses have skyrocketed to nearly $6 billion from about $90 million last year. Major Impact from Single Event: The collapse of Mantra’s OM token alone accounts for 92% of the current losses, highlighting how one sophisticated scam can inflict. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/crypto-rug-pulls-decline-66-in-2025-but-financial-impact-grows/

data.title: One address has accumulated a profit of $108,000 by purchasing two recent Binance Wallet IDO projects
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, an address has accumulated a profit of $108,000 by purchasing Binance Wallet IDO projects in the past two times. It bought FHE at $0.05447 three days ago, with a return rate of 24.7%; and opened a BANK position at $0.01964 an hour ago, with a return rate of 93%.
